title: Create Sleep Log
description: Creates a log entry for a sleep event and returns a response in the format requested.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Log entry date in the format yyyy-MM-dd.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start time; hours and minutes in the format HH:mm.

response_fields.name: sleep : dateOfSleep
response_fields.description: The data the sleep log ended.

response_fields.name: sleep : duration
response_fields.description: Length of the sleep in milliseconds.

response_fields.name: sleep : efficiency
response_fields.description: Calculated sleep efficiency score. This is not the sleep score available in the mobile application.

response_fields.name: sleep : levels : data : dateTime
response_fields.description: Timestamp the user started in sleep level.

response_fields.name: sleep : levels : data : level
response_fields.description: The sleep level the user entered.

response_fields.name: sleep : levels : data : seconds
response_fields.description: The length of time the user was in the sleep level. Displayed in seconds.

response_fields.name: sleep : levels : summary : [stage] : count
response_fields.description: Total number of times the user entered the sleep level.

response_fields.name: sleep : levels : summary : [stage] : minutes
response_fields.description: Total number of minutes the user appeared in the sleep level.

response_fields.name: sleep : minutesAfterWakeup
response_fields.description: The total number of minutes after the user woke up.

response_fields.name: sleep : minutesAsleep
response_fields.description: The total number of minutes the user was asleep.

response_fields.name: sleep : minutesAwake
response_fields.description: The total number of minutes the user was awake.

response_fields.name: sleep : minutesToFallAsleep
response_fields.description: The total number of minutes before the user fell asleep.

response_fields.name: sleep : timeInBed
response_fields.description: Total number of minutes the user was in bed.

response_fields.name: sleep : type
response_fields.description: The type of sleep log. Supported : classic | stages
